great_white_shark.funFact: This is a great white shark!

kite.funFact: Kites were invented in China over 2,800 years ago!

great_grey_owl.funFact: This is a great grey owl!

european_fire_salamander.funFact: This is a european fire salamander!

black_and_gold_garden_spider.funFact: This is a black and gold garden spider!

little_blue_heron.funFact: This is a little blue heron!

american_staffordshire_terrier.funFact: This is a american staffordshire terrier!

kerry_blue_terrier.funFact: This is a kerry blue terrier!

wire-haired_fox_terrier.funFact: This is a wire-haired fox terrier!

soft-coated_wheaten_terrier.funFact: This is a soft-coated wheaten terrier!

west_highland_white_terrier.funFact: This is a west highland white terrier!

chesapeake_bay_retriever.funFact: This is a chesapeake bay retriever!

german_short-haired_pointer.funFact: This is a german short-haired pointer!

welsh_springer_spaniel.funFact: This is a welsh springer spaniel!

irish_water_spaniel.funFact: This is a irish water spaniel!

old_english_sheepdog.funFact: This is a old english sheepdog!

bouvier_des_flandres.funFact: This is a bouvier des flandres!

greater_swiss_mountain_dog.funFact: This is a greater swiss mountain dog!

bernese_mountain_dog.funFact: This is a bernese mountain dog!

african_hunting_dog.funFact: This is a african hunting dog!

lion.funFact: A lion's roar can be heard from 8 km away!

tiger.funFact: No two tigers have the same stripe pattern!

american_black_bear.funFact: This is a american black bear!

bee.funFact: A honeybee visits 50–100 flowers per trip!

backpack.funFact: The word backpack was first used in 1914!

balloon.funFact: The first hot air balloon carried a duck, sheep and rooster!

drum.funFact: Drums are the oldest musical instruments — 5,500 years!

laptop.funFact: The first laptop computer weighed over 11 kg!

maillot_tank_suit.funFact: This is a maillot tank suit!

steel_arch_bridge.funFact: This is a steel arch bridge!

television.funFact: The first TV remote was called 'Lazy Bones' in 1950!

umbrella.funFact: Umbrellas were originally used for shade from the sun, not rain!

hotdog.funFact: Americans eat 20 billion hot dogs per year!

mushroom.funFact: The largest living organism on Earth is a fungus!

strawberry.funFact: Strawberries are the only fruit with seeds on the outside!

lemon.funFact: Lemons were once so rare they were given as royal gifts!

pineapple.funFact: It takes almost 2 years to grow a single pineapple!

pizza.funFact: Americans eat about 3 billion pizzas per year!

cup.funFact: The world's largest coffee cup held 22,000 litres!

yellow_lady's_slipper.funFact: This is a yellow lady's slipper!

dog.funFact: Dogs can smell 100,000 times better than humans!

bird.funFact: Some birds can mimic human speech perfectly!

fish.funFact: Fish can drown if there is not enough oxygen in water!

rabbit.funFact: Rabbits can jump up to 3 feet high and 9 feet long!

horse.funFact: Horses can sleep both standing up and lying down!

cow.funFact: Cows have best friends and get stressed when separated!

pig.funFact: Pigs are smarter than dogs and even some primates!

chicken.funFact: Chickens can remember over 100 different faces!

duck.funFact: Ducks' feet have no nerves or blood vessels — so they never feel the cold!

elephant.funFact: Elephants are the only animals that cannot jump!

bear.funFact: Bears can run up to 40 km/h — faster than most humans!

monkey.funFact: Monkeys can recognize themselves in mirrors!

penguin.funFact: Penguins propose to their mates with a pebble!

parrot.funFact: Parrots can live up to 80 years!

turtle.funFact: Some turtles can breathe through their skin!

frog.funFact: Frogs drink water through their skin, not their mouths!

shark.funFact: Sharks have been around longer than trees!

panda.funFact: A panda can eat up to 38 kg of bamboo per day!

hamburger.funFact: The first hamburger was sold in 1900 in the USA!

ice cream.funFact: It takes 50 licks to finish one scoop of ice cream!

cake.funFact: The world's largest cake weighed over 58,000 kg!

bread.funFact: Bread is one of the oldest foods — 30,000 years old!

cookie.funFact: The chocolate chip cookie was invented by accident!

egg.funFact: A chicken can lay up to 300 eggs per year!

coffee.funFact: Coffee is the second most traded commodity in the world!

milk.funFact: It takes about 10 pounds of milk to make 1 pound of cheese!

cherry.funFact: It takes about 7,000 cherries to make one gallon of cherry juice!

peach.funFact: Peaches and nectarines are almost the same fruit!

car.funFact: The world's fastest car can go over 400 km/h!

bus.funFact: The first motor bus service started in 1895 in Germany!

train.funFact: The fastest train in the world goes 600 km/h!

airplane.funFact: An airplane travels about 900 km/h at cruising speed!

bicycle.funFact: Bicycles are the most energy-efficient vehicle ever made!

motorcycle.funFact: The first motorcycle was built in 1885 in Germany!

boat.funFact: Boats have been used by humans for over 10,000 years!

truck.funFact: The longest truck in the world is 53 meters long!

helicopter.funFact: Helicopters can fly sideways, backwards and hover still!

phone.funFact: More people have mobile phones than toilets in the world!

book.funFact: The most expensive book ever sold was $30 million!

bottle.funFact: A glass bottle takes 1 million years to decompose!

clock.funFact: The most accurate clock loses 1 second every 300 million years!

ball.funFact: Soccer is the most popular sport in the world!

teddy bear.funFact: Teddy bears were named after US President Theodore Roosevelt!

chair.funFact: The most expensive chair ever sold cost $28 million!

pencil.funFact: A pencil can draw a line 50 km long!

tree.funFact: Trees can communicate with each other through their roots!

flower.funFact: Flowers can improve your mood and reduce stress!

cactus.funFact: A cactus can survive up to 2 years without water!

guitar.funFact: The guitar is the most popular instrument in the world!

camera.funFact: The first digital camera weighed 3.6 kg and took 23 seconds to take a photo!
